程序包 org.apache.dubbo.config.spring.beans.factory.annotation

  • 类概要 
    类 说明
    AnnotatedInterfaceConfigBeanBuilder<C extends AbstractInterfaceConfig>
    An Abstract Builder to build Interface Config Bean that annotated some annotation.
    DubboConfigAliasPostProcessor
    A Post-Processor class to set the alias of Dubbo Config bean using its AbstractConfig.getId()
    ReferenceAnnotationBeanPostProcessor
    BeanPostProcessor implementation that Consumer service Reference annotated fields
    ServiceAnnotationBeanPostProcessor 已过时
    Recommend ServiceClassPostProcessor as the substitute
    ServiceBeanNameBuilder
    Dubbo @Service Bean Builder
    ServiceClassPostProcessor
    BeanFactoryPostProcessor used for processing of @Service annotated classes. it's also the infrastructure class of XML BeanDefinitionParser on <dubbo:annotation />
